packageRules.description: Kotlin is governed by AGP 9's built-in Kotlin (KGP 2.2.10), not Renovate. The kotlinVersion pin in src/BlazorNative.Jni/build.gradle.kts must equal AGP's bundled KGP - a stdlib ahead of the compiler fails the android-build check (see #77). Bump Kotlin only in lockstep with an AGP upgrade whose built-in KGP moves.
